name: Postgres
description: Query your database in natural language
longDescription: Point BrowseCortex at a Postgres database and ask questions in plain English. The AI inspects your schema, writes and runs read queries, and explains results—great for quick analytics and debugging.
author: BrowseCortex

apiKeyConfig.label: Bearer Token
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Token your Postgres MCP host expects in the Authorization header

examplePrompts: How many users signed up last week?
Show me the schema for the orders table
Find the top 10 customers by revenue
What's the average order value by month?
List tables that reference the products table
